references.key: let mold mt 1 and mnew mt
references.raw: Copy overlapping rows (preserve old embeddings). Let Mold = Mt−1 and Mnew = Mt . For the overlap 1:Mold , we copy the learned embeddings: Et [1:Mold ] ← Et−1 [1:Mold ].
references.title: Let Mold = Mt−1 and Mnew = Mt

references.key: for newly added models m mold 1
references.raw: Initialise new rows. For newly added models m ∈ {Mold +1, . . . , Mnew }, we initialise their embedding rows with Xavier-uniform: Et [Mold +1:Mnew ] ∼ XavierUniform.
